criteria.text: I answered before reveal and judged whether the answer works in context.

actions.label: Again
actions.meaning: Could not produce a useful answer yet.

actions.label: Hard
actions.meaning: Produced a partial answer with high effort.

criteria.text: I selected an option and read why each option works, fails, or depends.

actions.label: Confused
actions.meaning: Choices did not clarify the distinction.
